attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST_PV.BATCH_ID, 
ST_PV.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST_PV.ACTION_CODE, 
ST_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
ST_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER, 
ST_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER, 
ST_PV.CREATED_BY, 
ST_PV.CREATION_DATE, 
ST_PV.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
ST_PV.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_PV.VIOLATION_TYPE, 
ST_PV.ALLOWABLE_AMOUNT, 
ST_PV.FUNC_CURRENCY_ALLOWABLE_AMT, 
ST_PV.ORG_ID, 
ST_PV.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
ST_PV.EXCEEDED_AMOUNT, 
ST_PV.VIOLATION_DATE, 
ST_PV.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_PV.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_POL_VIOLAT_ALL ST_PV
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION WRK,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD
WHERE 
ST_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER = WRK.SK_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM_INT
AND ST_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER = WRK.SK_VIOLATION_NUM_INT
AND ST_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID = WRK.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID
AND ST_PV.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WRK.SS_CD 
)

SELECT 
A.VIOLATION_TYPE POLICY_VIOLATION_TYPE_CD, 
A.REPORT_HEADER_ID SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
A.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER SK_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM_INT, 
A.VIOLATION_NUMBER SK_VIOLATION_NUM_INT , 
SM_PV.SS_CD SS_CD, 
SM_PV.ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION_KEY ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION_KEY, 
A.VIOLATION_DATE VIOLATION_DT, 
A.ALLOWABLE_AMOUNT ALLOWABLE_AMT, 
A.EXCEEDED_AMOUNT EXCEEDED_AMT,
N_ERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
N_ERL.ER_LINE_LAST_UPDATE_DTM , 'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
( SELECT 
EX_PV.VIOLATION_TYPE, 
EX_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
EX_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER, 
EX_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER, 
EX_PV.GLOBAL_NAME, 
EX_PV.VIOLATION_DATE, 
EX_PV.ALLOWABLE_AMOUNT, 
EX_PV.EXCEEDED_AMOUNT 
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_AP_POL_VIOLAT_ALL EX_PV
UNION
SELECT 
ST_PV.VIOLATION_TYPE, 
ST_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
ST_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER, 
ST_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER, 
ST_PV.GLOBAL_NAME, 
ST_PV.VIOLATION_DATE, 
ST_PV.ALLOWABLE_AMOUNT, 
ST_PV.EXCEEDED_AMOUNT 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_POL_VIOLAT_ALL ST_PV
) A,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE N_ERL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD,
$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION SM_PV,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT  N_ER
WHERE
A.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER = SM_PV.SK_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM_INT
AND A.VIOLATION_NUMBER = SM_PV.SK_VIOLATION_NUM_INT
AND A.REPORT_HEADER_ID = SM_PV.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID
AND A.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SM_PV.SS_CD 
AND SM_PV.SS_CD = N_ERL.BK_SS_CD
AND  A.REPORT_HEADER_ID = N_ER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = N_ER.BK_SS_CD
AND N_ER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY = N_ERL.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY
AND A.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER = N_ERL.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT
AND N_ERL.ER_LINE_TYPE_CD  <> 'Exchange Rate Rounding'
/* AND (N_ERL.ER_LINE_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD IS NULL OR 
N_ERL.ER_LINE_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD <> 'INCORRECT_RECEIPTS' ) */
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION_KEY
ORDER	BY N_ERL.ER_LINE_LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC) = 1

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ST_MF_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
ST_MF_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER, 
ST_MF_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER,
ST_MF_PV.GLOBAL_NAME) + MAX_VAL ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION_KEY,
CAST(ST_MF_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID AS INTEGER) SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID,
ST_MF_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER SK_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM_INT,
ST_MF_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER SK_VIOLATION_NUM_INT,
N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_POL_VIOLAT_ALL ST_MF_PV,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION) SM_ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION
WHERE
ST_MF_PV.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
AND
NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT
1 
FROM
$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_ER_LINE_POLICY_VIOLATION SM_ER_POL_VIO
WHERE
 SM_ER_POL_VIO.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID = ST_MF_PV.REPORT_HEADER_ID  AND  SM_ER_POL_VIO.SK_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUM_INT = ST_MF_PV.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER
AND  SM_ER_POL_VIO.SK_VIOLATION_NUM_INT = ST_MF_PV.VIOLATION_NUMBER
AND  SM_ER_POL_VIO.SS_CD = N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
)
